# opnsense_quagga_ospf_area (Data Source)

Configure OSPF areas.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `area_id` (String) The area ID in IPv4 dotted notation.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this OSPF area.
- `type` (String) The area type.
